assessment.note: He names a concrete blocker to next-level growth: bigger scope is the goal, but he is still operating in execution details rather than at broader scope.

new_queue.label: Execution details
new_queue.name: Which execution details are still taking too much of your time?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific tactical work keeping him below the scope he wants.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Role in practice
new_queue.name: What feels most solid in your role right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the parts of his current Head of Product scope that feel steady and real.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Next-level meaning
new_queue.name: What does senior scope mean to you in practice?
new_queue.description: Gets his definition of the next-level role without jumping straight to performance gaps.

new_queue.label: Ownership boundary
new_queue.name: What are you still carrying personally that should live with the team?
new_queue.description: Tests whether he is holding onto executor work that should be delegated or systematized.

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: Where would a sharper read from me help you move faster?
new_queue.description: Opens a concrete ask of the manager without defaulting to generic support.

new_queue.label: First growth move
new_queue.name: What is the first shift you want to make before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete next move he owns.
